message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Handbuch Der Deutschen Geschichte 1871–1918 (Historical Statistics of the German Empire)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8144","justification":"ZA8144 contains historical statistical data for the German Empire between 1871 and 1918, directly covering the German Reich (1871–1945) and including the 1870s–1910s period requested."},{"title":"German Elections in the Empire 1871–1912","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8013","justification":"ZA8013 provides constituency-level data on Reichstag elections in the German Empire from 1871 to 1912, aligning with the German Reich framework and covering the decades 1870s–1910s."},{"title":"Reichstag Election Data for the German Empire 1871–1912 (Raschke)","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8011","justification":"ZA8011 supplies historical election data for the Imperial Reichstag from 1871 to 1912, offering political-historical insight into the German Reich across the 1870s–1910s."},{"title":"Historical Household Data German Empire, 1870–1913","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8383","justification":"ZA8383 includes micro-level historical data on households in the German Empire between 1870 and 1913, directly related to social and economic history during the specified decades."},{"title":"German Occupational and Social Structure in the Empire 1882–1907","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8385","justification":"ZA8385 documents occupational and social structural change in the German Empire from 1882 to 1907, covering much of the 1880s, 1890s, and 1900s in the German Reich."},{"title":"Historical Time Series: Population and Economy of the German Empire 1871–1913","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8143","justification":"ZA8143 compiles historical time series on population and economic indicators for the German Empire 1871–1913, matching the German Reich and decades of interest."},{"title":"German Imperial Navy Personnel 1871–1918","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8501","justification":"ZA8501 offers historical data on personnel of the Imperial German Navy between 1871 and 1918, relevant to military and institutional history within the German Reich timeframe."},{"title":"Urbanization and Industrialization in the German Empire 1875–1910","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8387","justification":"ZA8387 contains city-level historical data on urbanization and industrialization processes in the German Empire between 1875 and 1910, directly overlapping with the 1870s–1910s decades."},{"title":"Historical Demographic Data for German Cities 1871–1910","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8384","justification":"ZA8384 provides demographic statistics for German cities within the Empire from 1871 to 1910, relevant for historical population studies in the specified period of the German Reich."},{"title":"Industrial Firms and Workers in the German Empire 1882–1907","url_or_doi":"https://search.gesis.org/research_data/ZA8386","justification":"ZA8386 includes historical data on industrial firms and workers in the German Empire from 1882 to 1907, covering late 19th to early 20th century economic history in the German Reich."}]}
